mechanism_narrative: Positive 3-month momentum in retail sales indicates resilient nominal demand and near-term revenue support for listed firms, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS vintage_value 757085.0 for 2026-04-01 available by decision date
failure_condition: Reject if positive 3-month RSAFS momentum is followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in less than the sample base rate or if walk-forward Rank IC is below 0.03 over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate crosses upward relative to its 12-month average, higher discount rates reduce equity duration values and tighten financial conditions, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS crosses above its 12-month moving average and rises by more than 25bp over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS vintage_value 3.64 for 2026-04-01 available by decision date
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations produce positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if triggered mean returns are not below untriggered returns at p < 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in unemployment signals weakening household income and recession risk, lowering expected earnings and risk appetite, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by more than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE vintage_value 4.3 for 2026-04-01 available by decision date
failure_condition: Reject if UNRATE surge triggers are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of cases or if the triggered downside effect vanishes in two consecutive 5-year walk-forward windows.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer prices combined with a non-declining policy rate signals persistent inflation pressure and limited room for easing, raising real discount-rate uncertainty and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 6-month annualized growth exceeds 4% and FEDFUNDS is flat or rising over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:CPIAUCSL vintage_value 332.407 and FEDFUNDS vintage_value 3.64 for 2026-04-01 available by decision date
failure_condition: Reject if the joint CPIAUCSL-FEDFUNDS trigger has no incremental negative return effect versus either single proxy alone or if interaction-term t-statistic is below 1.5 in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: Positive industrial production momentum indicates improving goods-sector output and operating leverage, supporting earnings revisions and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO 3-month change is positive for two consecutive monthly releases
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO vintage_value 102.4963 for 2026-04-01 available by decision date
failure_condition: Reject if consecutive positive INDPRO momentum episodes do not produce higher 60-day S&P 500 returns than negative momentum episodes, or if the sign is negative in more than half of walk-forward folds.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp housing-starts contraction signals weaker construction activity, durables demand, and credit-sensitive household formation, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST falls more than 10% year over year or crosses below its 12-month moving average
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST vintage_value 1502.0 for 2026-03-01 available by decision date
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST contraction triggers are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of instances or if triggered mean returns are not below baseline returns at p < 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll expansion combined with a stable unemployment rate indicates labor-income growth without visible layoff stress, supporting consumption expectations and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS increases over 3 months and UNRATE does not rise by more than 0.1 percentage points over the same period
evidence_refs: fact:PAYEMS vintage_value 158736 and UNRATE vintage_value 4.3 for 2026-04-01 available by decision date
failure_condition: Reject if the PAYEMS-UNRATE joint condition fails to outperform PAYEMS alone over 5 trading days or if conditional win rate is below the unconditional positive-return base rate.

mechanism_narrative: Real GDP growth above its prior-quarter level indicates broad demand expansion and stronger aggregate cash-flow expectations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 quarter-over-quarter growth is positive and exceeds its 4-quarter moving average
evidence_refs: fact:GDPC1 vintage_value 24174.527 for 2026-01-01 available by decision date
failure_condition: Reject if positive above-trend GDPC1 releases are not followed by higher 60-day S&P 500 returns than below-trend releases or if walk-forward Rank IC is negative in two consecutive 3-year windows.
